response.justification: Bogdan has a broad full-stack background spanning ~16 years and has touched high-throughput systems (millions of HTTP requests/second at Dunnhumby), but the resume shows no meaningful experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing frameworks, feature flagging, growth telemetry, or statistical analysis — which are the core competencies for this role. His current seniority (Staff/Senior) and the scope of his most impactful work fall short of the Principal/IC6 bar, which requires demonstrated ownership of org-wide, multi-team foundational systems. The role demands someone who has built and owned experimentation infrastructure at scale; there is no evidence of that here.
strengths: Genuine polyglot with production experience across TypeScript, C/C++, D, Java, and Node.js — satisfies the language breadth requirement
Dunnhumby role demonstrates hands-on experience with high-throughput, low-latency distributed systems processing millions of requests per second
History of open-source platform ownership (GISCollective) and developer tooling (MCP code generators at re:cinq) shows system-building instincts
concerns: Zero mentioned experience with experimentation platforms, A/B testing, feature flagging, rollout automation, or bias/risk controls — the core of this role
No demonstrated work with metrics pipelines, telemetry infrastructure, or statistical/experimental analysis at any depth
Seniority gap: portfolio reflects Staff/Senior IC scope (individual feature delivery, team-level tooling) rather than Principal/IC6 cross-org, multi-workstream ownership

key_factors.factor: Missing telemetry and metrics infrastructure background
